sections.paragraph:
ὀνομάζω [ὄνομα] ‘identify through use of a special term’

—a. of applying a term that is understood as a person’s ‘name’, call, name Lk 6:14.

—b. of applying a term specifying a task, responsibility, or category call, name Mk 3:14 (apostle); 1 Cor 5:11 (brother); Eph 3:15 (family).

—c. of publicly calling attention to someone/someth. mention, publicize, name Ro 15:20 (Christ); Eph 1:21 (any name); 5:3 (fornication); 2 Ti 2:19 (Lord).

—d. invoke as name, w. cognate acc. Ac 19:13.
